description:
Purpose: finalize UI-facing runtime projection.

Done when:
- streaming and AgentView support a clean UI story
- projected state matches the canonical runtime state

comments.text: E10 complete: streaming supports caller-owned request streams with await/failure/cancellation coverage; AgentView is positioned as UI projection, preserves session semantics, and is projection-only. Full gate passed on each child.

title: V3 E10: Streaming and AgentView
